author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
Thankfully, President Trump, the First Lady, all members of the Cabinet, the media, and guests are safe. @POTUS has displayed incredible composure and leadership tonight.

I want to thank the U.S. Secret Service and law enforcement personnel for their quick and heroic actions.

An investigation is ongoing, and we will provide updates as they become available.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
My prayers are with everyone in Oklahoma impacted by last night’s tornadoes and severe storms, especially those in Enid, Garfield County, Gray Ridge, and Vance AFB. As an Oklahoman, I know how resilient our communities are, but I also know the heartbreak these events can bring.
 
State and local responders are leading the way, and @DHSgov and @FEMA are fully engaged. The FEMA team, including the acting Regional Administrator, is on the ground today working closely with Oklahoma officials to assess needs and support recovery.
 
This is just the start of a multi-day severe weather pattern across the Southern Plains and lower Mississippi Valley. Please stay alert, follow local guidance, and take all warnings seriously. Protecting American lives is always our top priority.

card.title: "A breaking point": Inside the 68-day DHS shutdown
card.description: In a department built to respond to catastrophic threats, employees have been reduced to bartering for office supplies.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
In the wake of Typhoon Sinlaku, @DHSgov and @FEMA continue to support locally led disaster response efforts in Guam and the Northern Mariana Islands (CNMI).

Together with territorial partners and other federal agencies, FEMA’s top priority is helping identify urgent needs and stabilizing critical lifelines like power, water, and communications.

Thank you @POTUS Trump for approval of two emergency declarations providing federal resources and technical expertise, including 400 FEMA and federal staff to assist in these efforts.

Our prayers are with those who have been affected by the storm. We will continue to work around the clock to ensure a safe and smooth recovery on the islands.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
Director Lyons has been a great leader of ICE and key player in helping the Trump administration remove murderers, rapists, pedophiles, terrorists, and gang members from American communities. He jumpstarted an agency that had not been allowed to do its job for four years. Thanks to his leadership, American communities are safer. 

We wish him luck on his next opportunity in the private sector. His last day is May 31, 2026.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.
Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
We are closely tracking Typhoon Sinlaku as it brings dangerous winds, heavy rain and flooding to Guam and the Northern Mariana Islands.

I thank @POTUS for his quick approval of two emergency declarations this weekend providing federal resources and technical expertise to support territorial response efforts to this storm. 
 
@FEMA is fully engaged and has embedded response teams throughout the Pacific region who are coordinating requests for aid. @USCG is also activated and prepared to respond.

For those affected by the storm, our prayers are with you. Please stay safe and follow directions from local officials who are working around the clock to keep you safe.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
On Monday, a DHS employee, Lauren Bullis, was brutally shot and stabbed to death by Olaolukitan Adon Abel, a 26-year-old, born in the United Kingdom, who was naturalized by the Biden Administration in 2022. 

Since President Trump took office, @USCIS has implemented measures to ensure individuals with criminal histories and who otherwise lack good moral character do not attain citizenship.

He possesses a prior criminal record that includes convictions for sexual battery, battery against a police officer, obstruction, and assault with a deadly weapon, vandalism and now stands accused of murdering @DHSgov employee Lauren Bullis by shooting and stabbing her while she walked her dog.

He has also been arrested for the murder of an unidentified woman whom he reportedly shot outside a Checkers, before randomly shooting a homeless man multiple times outside a Kroger in Brookhaven.

These acts of pure evil have devastated our Department and my prayers are with the families of the victims.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
Yesterday, I had the honor of visiting @USCG Air Station Astoria, Oregon where we honored Tyler Jaggers, an aviation survival technician who passed away as a result of critical injuries sustained during a medical evacuation mission. 

We toured the world class rescue facilities and met with the fearless men and women who protect our maritime borders. 

Thanks for keeping our country safe.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
Today, I had the opportunity to meet the fearless State and Local leaders of western North Carolina who are rebuilding their communities after the devastation of Hurricane Helene. 

I saw first hand hurricane damage still present and will be making sure @FEMA relief continues to help Americans rebuild their homes and communities.

I am humbled and honored to serve the citizens of our great Homeland. Thanks for having me.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
Thank you @POTUS Trump and @SecScottBessent, for providing DHS employees who have gone without pay for almost 50 days an automatic extension on their tax filling. 

Through this new agreement, they will be granted a grace period where they won’t be required to file their taxes until May 15, 2026.
 
During the Democrats’ reckless shutdown, the hardworking men and women of @DHSgov have continued to work around the clock without pay to protect the homeland. Democrats must re-open DHS.
